---
name: "✨ Suggest an improvement"
about: Fix an error, sharpen an explanation, or improve structure
title: "[improve] <short summary>"
labels: ["improvement"]
---

## What's the issue?

<!-- Is something wrong, out of date, unclear, or missing? Be specific:
which file, which stage, which line. -->

- **File / stage:**
- **What's wrong or missing:**

## Proposed change

<!-- Concretely, what should it say instead? Bullet points or a suggested
rewrite are perfect. If it's a factual correction, link a source. -->

## Why it's better

<!-- Keep the house style in mind: sharp, senior, concrete, answer-first,
interview-angled, dated 2026. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've pointed to the exact location
- [ ] I've suggested concrete replacement text (not just "this is bad")
- [ ] Any new claim is backed by a linkable source
